channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: What Should I Know About the Current and Pending (Other) Support (CPOS) Common Form?
item.description: The CPOS Common Form must be used for all NIH grant applications, Just in Time (JIT), Research Performance Progress Report (RPPR), and Prior Approval submissions to NIH with due dates on or after January 25, 2026.

item.title: BIO Fair
item.description: BTO will host the BTO Innovation Opportunity Fair event for prospective proposers on June 5, 2026, in Tysons, Va. Advance registration is required. | See Event

item.title: Applicability of Transparency Act Subaward Reporting Requirements
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-066 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of NINDS's Participation in PA-25-304: NIH Exploratory/Developmental Research Project Grant (Parent R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)
item.description: Notice NOT-NS-26-009 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: An Update on Modernizing the NIH Grants and Funding Site: Helping the Research Community Quickly and Easily Understand NIH Funding Policies, Processes, and Activities
item.description: The NIH Grants and Funding site is modernizing its digital web presence, serving as the central location for navigating information on NIH’s grants policies, programs, and funding activities.

item.title: Podcast: AI-powered labs accelerating scientific discovery
item.description: U.S. National Science Foundation-supported engineers are developing a bold new vision for chemical and materials discovery. Milad Abolhasani, a professor in the Department of Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering at North Carolina State University…

item.title: Implementation of Changes for Basic Experimental Studies with Humans
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-067 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: NIH Awards by Month
item.description: A new resource provides a clear view of NIH monthly funding trends across fiscal years.
